summary: STORY-010 (cart badge reflects item count) was driven through all four gates as a system test of the Qaizen pipeline. Four automate_e2e test cases were generated against the running SauceDemo app and all passed; every risk is covered and passing.
release_recommendation_reasoning: All four E2E test cases passed against the live application; every risk (RISK-001/002/003) is covered_passing; there are zero uncovered high-severity risks and zero bug drafts. The cart-badge behavior (appear at 1, count distinct items, decrement and disappear at empty, survive navigation) was verified against the running SauceDemo app, satisfying all four acceptance criteria.
open_questions: Toolchain caveat (not a release blocker): `npm run lint` fails on TypeScript type syntax in the generated test because eslint.config.mjs has no @typescript-eslint parser. The test passes strict typecheck and the Gate-4 static scan. Tracked for a separate config fix; adding the parser is a new dependency requiring human approval (CLAUDE.md §3.11).
